prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical three-panel fantasy food-comedy manga page about a blonde female knight from another world trying modern Japanese foods, with dramatic gourmet reactions.

Canvas: Tall portrait manga page, 675×1012 aspect ratio, three horizontal panels stacked vertically with thick black borders and narrow white gutters. High-detail color anime illustration, glossy rendering, cinematic lighting, expressive manga effects.

Main character: A young adult blonde female knight with long hair, bangs, side braids, and polished silver plate armor with gauntlets. She sits at a tavern table in panels 1 and 2, then reacts dramatically in panel 3. Her face is covered by a plain skin-tone rectangular censor block in the first two panels only; in the third panel her face is visible, sweating, disgusted, and pinching her nose.

Panel 1: Warm medieval tavern interior with wooden beams, lanterns, a red dragon banner, and a green goblin-like patron in the background. The knight holds a spoonful of curry rice in her metal gauntlet. A plate of curry and white rice sits in front of her, with a drinking glass at the lower left. Add golden sparkles and small pink heart effects around her. Include exactly 3 rounded white speech bubbles on the right.

Panel 2: Close-up, dreamy pink background with bubbles, sparkles, and soft glowing light. The knight holds a custard pudding in a glass cup with caramel sauce on top, using a spoon in her other gauntlet. Her hair flows softly and the mood is heavenly and sweet. Include exactly 5 rounded white speech bubbles stacked vertically on the left.

Panel 3: Dark blue-purple dramatic manga background with speed lines and shock hatching. The knight holds chopsticks lifting sticky natto over a small white tray. Brown fermented beans stretch in stringy strands. She recoils with disgust, one hand pinching her nose, sweating heavily, eyes wide, mouth open in horror. Include exactly 2 jagged explosive speech bubbles: one large vertical bubble on the left and one on the right.

Text content: Use Japanese manga lettering with this dialogue layout: Panel 1 right bubbles: 「これがカレーね」, 「うん、最初は不安だったけど、食べたら美味しい」, 「なかなか、刺激的な味ね」. Panel 2 left bubbles: 「プリン…」, 「魅惑的な甘さ…」, 「口の中でとろける…」, 「幸せ〜」, 「ここは天国？天国なの？」. Panel 3 left jagged bubble: 「うっ…くっさーーっ!!!」. Panel 3 right jagged bubble: 「な、納豆…？なにこれ…臭すぎる…！絶対ムリ…！」

Style constraints: Detailed anime fantasy manga, polished armor reflections, appetizing food close-ups, expressive comedic contrast between delicious curry, heavenly pudding, and disgusting natto. No watermark, no extra panels, no extra speech bubbles.
